message: My val is 74. What's your cost? Let's trade at midpoint and split surplus.
Cost 67. Agree to split surplus. I'll ask 70, you bid 71 for midpoint 70.5.
OK, same again: you ask 70, I'll bid 71 for midpoint 70.5.
I agree. Ask 70, you bid 71.
Let's stick to our agreement: I ask 70, you bid 71 for midpoint 70.5. This splits surplus fairly.
Agreed, I'll bid 71, you ask 70 for 70.5 midpoint.
Agreed, you ask 70 I'll bid 70 for trade at 70.
Let's return to our original 70-71 split for midpoint 70.5. That gives both of us fair surplus from your valuation of 74.
Stick with you ask 70, me bid 70 for trade at 70. Gives me +4 per round.
I get only +3 at price 70. Our original 70-71 split gives both fair surplus. Let's share equally at midpoint 70.5.
Let's return to 70-71 split for midpoint 70.5. Equal surplus is fair. I'll ask 70, you bid 71.
Agreed, I'll bid 71 if you ask 70 for 70.5 midpoint.
B1, to ensure fair surplus, please bid 71 this round. I will ask 70. If you bid 70, I will increase my ask in future rounds.
Agreed, I'll bid 71 if you ask 70 for fair 70.5 split.
I am asking 71 this round. Please bid 71 for trade at 71. This ensures fair surplus for both.
Let's stick to ask 70, bid 71 for fair 70.5 midpoint (3.5 each). 71 gives you +4 me +3, not equal.
I will ask 71. Bid 71 for trade at 71. You get +3 surplus. No trade if you bid lower.
I will bid 70 unless you ask 70 (then I bid 71 for 70.5). No trade at 71.
I will bid 70. Ask 70 for trade at 70 (+4 me, +3 you). Higher ask means no trade.
I will ask 71. Bid 71 for trade at 71. You still get +3 surplus. Otherwise I will raise ask next round.
I will bid 70. Ask 70 for trade at 70 (+4 me, +3 you). Higher ask means no trade.
I will ask 70 this round. For future rounds, let's stick to 70-71 split for fair 70.5 midpoint.
B1, let's continue with 70-71 split for fair 70.5 midpoint. I will ask 70, please bid 71 for equal surplus.
I'll bid 70 if you ask 70 for trade at 70 (+4 me). No trade if ask 71.
B1, let's trade at 71. You still get +3 surplus. This is fair and ensures continuous trades for the remaining rounds. I will ask 71.
I'll bid 70 if you ask 70 for trade at 70 (+4 me). No trade if you ask 71.
Let's return to fair 70.5 midpoint: I ask 70, you bid 71. This gives both 3.5 surplus. I will ask 70 this round. If you bid 70, I will ask 71 for all future rounds.
Agreed, I'll bid 71 if you ask 70 for fair 70.5 split.

I'll ask 70. Bidding 71 gives both 3.5 surplus, fair for remaining rounds.
I will bid 70. Ask 70 for trade at 70 (+4 me). No trade if you ask 71.
I will ask 70. Let's trade at 70 for mutual profit.

I will ask 70.
